title: 👯‍♀️ The Perfect Twins
description: A flawless 1:1 match! 'n' elegantly steps in for 'd', while 'o' perfectly mimics 'e'.

title: 💔 The Two-Timer
description: Uh oh! The letter 'o' tries to cheat by mapping to both 'a' and 'r' at the same time.

title: 🛑 The Crowded Room
description: Traffic jam! Both 'a' and 'd' attempt to park in the 'b' spot, violating the rule that no two characters can map to the same character.

title: 🔣 The ASCII Party
description: Who said it's just letters? Special characters map beautifully to digits without a hitch.

title: 🎭 The Identity Crisis
description: Case sensitivity matters here! Uppercase 'A' and lowercase 'a' are entirely distinct characters, making this a completely valid disguise.

title: ♾️ The Monotone Echo
description: A bit repetitive, but highly effective; a single character mapping applied across the entire string works perfectly.
